---
title: "Mastering Conjoint Analysis"
format: 
  gfm:
    wrap: preserve
---

Website for Andrew Heiss's ["Mastering Conjoint Analysis"](https://andrewheiss.github.io/mastering-conjoint-analysis_2026-06/) [Statistical Horizons course](https://statisticalhorizons.com/seminars/mastering-conjoint-analysis/).
